original text:
Kings Boiler Hire | Annual boiler inspection due?
Can't stop production?
Hire a temporary unit from Kings.
Kings like to make life easier for you!
Many of our clients simply cannot stop production and so when the annual insurance inspection is due on their own plant they simply pre-book a rental boiler from Kings.
We can deliver and have the temporary unit running anywhere in the UK so there is no downtime, and collect when the clients boiler is back in action.
Simple, smooth and efficient.
Let King's Boiler Hire keep your production running ... call today!
